title: Soldotna volunteer receives National Community Action Partnership Award
summary: Soldotna, Alaska – Rhonda D. Johnson, who volunteers extensively with the Rural Alaska Community Action Program, Inc., (RurAL CAP), received the National Community Action Volunteer Recognition Award for her support of the Mutual Self-Help Housing (MSHH) Program. title: NMFS Halibut ABM Paper Published
summary: The draft EIS for the BSAI Halibut ABM published along with the public comment instructions and timing. The document analyzes a proposed management measure to link the halibut PSC limit for the Amendment 80 fleet to halibut abundance. Final action is scheduled for the December 2021 Council meeting.
